headline: Southern (SO) Valuation Check As Shares Edge Higher Without A Clear Catalyst
summary: Southern stock moves without a clear headline catalyst Southern (SO) has seen its stock return roughly 1.1% over the past day and just under 0.6% over the past week, even without a specific news event clearly driving the recent trading interest. See our latest analysis for Southern. At a share price of $92.60, Southern’s recent 1.1% one day share price return and softer 30 day and 90 day share price returns contrast with stronger long term total shareholder returns of 8.35% over one year and...

headline: Forget Oklo: Buy This Entrenched High-Yield Utility Giant on the Dip Instead
summary: Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) is the ticker dominating retail feeds right now, riding a 14 GW pipeline of non-binding data-center letters of intent and a wave of small modular reactor euphoria. The fundamentals tell a different story than the price action. The Oklo Trade Is a Speculative Story With No Underlying Business Oklo reported $0 in revenue ...
